title: The EV71 Neutralizing Antibody Test
author: Jian-Te Lee
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7pwhmpe

steps.title: Inactivate serum (300 μl) at 56℃...
steps.instruction: Inactivate serum (300 μl) at 56℃ for 30 min %s %s

steps.title: Make 2 fold serial dilution of...
steps.instruction: Make 2 fold serial dilution of serum from 1:4 to 1:256 with 2% FBS DMEM %s %s a. Add 50 μl 2% FBS DMEM in well B to H b. ● means add 50μl serum sample c. After dilution, every well has 50μl sample d. ex. sample1-1 well H: serum control; sample 1-2 well H: cell control; 1-1 and 1-2 are duplicate

steps.title: Prepare control wells including virus control,...
steps.instruction: Prepare control wells including virus control, serum control and cell control. Virus control well：back titration from 100, 10, 1 to 1/10 100TCID 50 Serum control：add serum and cell only, no virus Cell control：add cell only, no serum and no virus

steps.title: Add 50 μl of adjusted virus...
steps.instruction: Add 50 μl of adjusted virus suspension (100TCID50EV71) onto the well A to well G of microtiterplate, shake reaction well slightly

steps.title: Incubate above reaction wells at 37℃for...
steps.instruction: Incubate above reaction wells at 37℃for 2 hours in 5% CO 2 incubator

steps.title: Prepare RD cells suspension and adjust...
steps.instruction: Prepare RD cells suspension and adjust cell concentration to 1×10 5 /ml

steps.title: Add 100μl of adjusted RD cell...
steps.instruction: Add 100μl of adjusted RD cell into each reaction well after 2 hours in step5

steps.title: Incubate wells at 37℃in 5% CO...
steps.instruction: Incubate wells at 37℃in 5% CO 2 incubator for 5-6 days until virus control well reach 100TCID 50

steps.title: Observe CPE in each well under...
steps.instruction: Observe CPE in each well under reverse microscope after 5-6 days incubation

steps.title: Check CPE in control wells Virus...
steps.instruction: Check CPE in control wells Virus control well：100% CPE in 100TCID 50 and 10TCID 50 ; 50% CPE in 1TCID 50 , < 10% CPE in 1/10TCID 50 Serum control well：no CPE Cell control well：no CPE

steps.title: The NT titer was calculated as...
steps.instruction: The NT titer was calculated as the reciprocal value of the last dilution of the antiserum that completely inhibited the CPE after incubation.

steps.title: Seropositivity was defined as a reciprocal...
steps.instruction: Seropositivity was defined as a reciprocal of the serotiter ≧ 8.
